holdings.infoBox: WCME is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 13.25%, SK hynix at 7.31%, SK Square at 5.85%, Samsung Electronics at 4.98%, and Teva Pharmaceutical Industries at 3.61%.

overview.description: The First Trust WCM Developing World Equity ETF (WCME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to select equity securities of industry leading companies in emerging or frontier markets. Companies selected are considered to have positive fundamentals and may be of any market capitalization WCME was launched on Mar 31, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
